economic_notes: Band holds 100% of K'ul Management Group Ltd. (KMGLTD) which controls multiple LPs and corporations including Westhills Aggregates, Coyote Cruises, Snpinktn Forestry, K'ul Construction, Skaha Hills Residential Development. Band holds 20% of Skaha Hills Limited Partnership and 25% of SnPink'Tn Developments Limited Partnership. Band received approximately 53% of revenues from ISC. OSR funds held in Revenue and Capital Trust accounts.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to management not completing assessment of tangible capital assets for potential asset retirement obligations under PS 3280 (effective April 1, 2022). Impact on expenses, surplus, TCA, and accumulated surplus cannot be quantified. Consolidated entities include PIB, PIBULP, and ONTEH. GBEs accounted for by modified equity: KMGLTD, SHLP, SDLP. KMGLTD had a net loss of $82,973 in 2023 vs net income of $5,921,978 in 2022 due to significant revenue decline from $19.5M to $8.5M. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + FNHA + FNESC + OTDC + Province of BC + BC First Nations Gaming = 17044129+179429+1273065+963205+112323+3861083+710529 = 24143763; property taxes treated as OSR hence osr = revenue lines excluding government transfers including property taxes, housing, interest, other, royalties, and business income.
